original text:
Originally Published: September 24, 2018 p.m.
Soledad O'Brien, 11:30 a.m., Yavapai College Performing Arts Center, 1100 Sheldon St, Prescott. Hear her take the roles play our communities create meaningful change.
Can you tell book its cover? p.m., Prescott Public Library, 215 Goodwin Street, Founders Suite (1st floor). The Professional Writers Prescott (PWP) will host Mariah Sinclair, award-winning book cover designer.
ESL, 7:30 p.m., Prescott Valley Public Library, Genealogy Room, 7401 Civic Circle.
The Rockin' Ukes, 6:30 7:30 p.m., Prescott Valley Public Library-Crystal Room, 7401 Civic Circle Dr. The Rockin' Ukes ukulele-centric band that plays eclectic mix classic rock, folk, country and whatever they feel like playing. Seating limited come early get seat. 928-759-3040.
Join Scouting Night, 6:30 p.m., St. Luke's Episcopal Church, 2000 Shepherds Lane, Prescott. Hosted Boy Scout Troop and Pack 10. Girl Scout Troop also open for girls who want join. 928-772-1312 email pack43@cox.net.
Sedona International Film Festival Presents "Quiz Show," Mary Fisher Theater, 2030 Highway 89A. Tickets are $4.25 and can purchased calling 928-282-1177 online 928-282-1177.
